scopes.name: mcp:read
scopes.description: Read-only tools: get_*, list_*, search_*, find_*, whoami.

scopes.name: mcp:admin
scopes.description: Read + write + admin tools. Only granted to PackRat admin users.

tools.name: packrat_add_pack_item
tools.title: Add Pack Item
tools.description: Add a gear item to a pack. Provide either a catalog_item_id (from packrat_search_gear_catalog) or specify custom item details. Weight should be in grams.

tools.name: packrat_add_pack_template_item
tools.title: Add Pack Template Item
tools.description: Add an item to a pack template.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_active_users
tools.title: Admin: Active Users
tools.description: Daily/weekly/monthly active user counts.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_activity
tools.title: Admin: Analytics Activity
tools.description: Platform activity metrics over a time period.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_catalog_embeddings
tools.title: Admin: Catalog Embedding Stats
tools.description: Catalog embedding coverage stats.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_catalog_overview
tools.title: Admin: Catalog Overview
tools.description: Catalog-wide overview: item count, brands, price ranges, embedding coverage.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_catalog_prices
tools.title: Admin: Catalog Prices
tools.description: Price distribution across the catalog.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_etl_failure_summary
tools.title: Admin: ETL Failure Summary
tools.description: Top recent ETL failure patterns. Page size is capped at 50 server-side.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_etl_job_failures
tools.title: Admin: ETL Job Failures
tools.description: Per-job ETL failure drill-down. Page size is capped at 50 server-side.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_etl_jobs
tools.title: Admin: ETL Jobs
tools.description: Recent ETL pipeline jobs. Page size is capped at 50 server-side.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_growth
tools.title: Admin: Analytics Growth
tools.description: Platform user/pack growth metrics.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_pack_breakdown
tools.title: Admin: Pack Breakdown
tools.description: Distribution of packs by category.

tools.name: packrat_admin_analytics_top_brands
tools.title: Admin: Top Brands
tools.description: Top gear brands in the catalog by item count. Page size is capped at 50 server-side.

tools.name: packrat_admin_delete_catalog_item
tools.title: Admin: Delete Catalog Item
tools.description: Delete a catalog item as admin. Prompts the user to type DELETE before proceeding.

tools.name: packrat_admin_delete_pack
tools.title: Admin: Delete Pack
tools.description: Soft-delete a pack as admin (bypasses ownership). Prompts the user to type DELETE before proceeding.

tools.name: packrat_admin_delete_trail_condition_report
tools.title: Admin: Delete Trail Condition Report
tools.description: Soft-delete a trail condition report as admin. Prompts the user to type DELETE before proceeding.

tools.name: packrat_admin_etl_reset_stuck
tools.title: Admin: ETL Reset Stuck Jobs
tools.description: Mark stuck-running ETL jobs as failed (admin maintenance).

tools.name: packrat_admin_etl_retry_job
tools.title: Admin: ETL Retry Job
tools.description: Retry a specific failed ETL job.

tools.name: packrat_admin_get_trail
tools.title: Admin: Get Trail
tools.description: Get a trail by OSM relation ID (admin).

tools.name: packrat_admin_get_trail_geometry
tools.title: Admin: Get Trail Geometry
tools.description: Get full GeoJSON geometry for a trail (admin).

tools.name: packrat_admin_hard_delete_user
tools.title: Admin: Hard-Delete User
tools.description: GDPR-style hard-delete of a user. Irrevocable. Requires a non-empty `reason` for the audit log. Prompts the user to retype the target user_id before proceeding.

tools.name: packrat_admin_list_catalog
tools.title: Admin: List Catalog Items
tools.description: Search/list catalog items across the platform. Page size is capped at 50 server-side; walk via the next `offset`.

tools.name: packrat_admin_list_packs
tools.title: Admin: List Packs
tools.description: Search/list packs across all users (admin view). Page size is capped at 50 server-side; walk via the next `offset` field.

tools.name: packrat_admin_list_trail_condition_reports
tools.title: Admin: List Trail Condition Reports
tools.description: List trail condition reports across all users (admin). Page size is capped at 50 server-side; walk via the next `offset`.

tools.name: packrat_admin_list_users
tools.title: Admin: List Users
tools.description: Search/list users (paginated). Use `q` to filter by email or name. Page size is capped at 50 server-side; the API returns a `{ data, total, limit, offset }` envelope which the model can walk via the next `offset`.

tools.name: packrat_admin_search_trails
tools.title: Admin: Search Trails
tools.description: Search OSM trails by name/sport (admin view). Page size is capped at 50 server-side; the response carries an `offset` and a `hasMore` flag for continuation.

tools.name: packrat_admin_stats
tools.title: Admin: Platform Stats
tools.description: Get high-level platform stats: user, pack, and catalog counts.

tools.name: packrat_admin_update_catalog_item
tools.title: Admin: Update Catalog Item
tools.description: Update a catalog item (name, brand, price, weight, etc.) as admin.

tools.name: packrat_analyze_pack_gaps
tools.title: Analyze Pack Gaps
tools.description: Identify missing essential gear categories for a specific trip context. Compares the pack's current categories against recommended essentials and returns what's missing.

tools.name: packrat_analyze_pack_image
tools.title: Analyze Pack Image
tools.description: Submit a gear image (R2 key from packrat_upload_image_url) for item detection. Returns detected items with catalog matches.

tools.name: packrat_analyze_pack_weight
tools.title: Analyze Pack Weight
tools.description: Return a detailed weight breakdown for a pack: total / base / worn / consumable grams plus a per-category aggregation sorted heaviest first.

tools.name: packrat_compare_gear_items
tools.title: Compare Gear Items
tools.description: Compare multiple gear items side-by-side on weight, price, and rating. Provide 2–10 catalog item IDs.

tools.name: packrat_create_app_pack_template
tools.title: Create App Pack Template (Admin)
tools.description: Create a curated app-level pack template visible to all users. Admin-only — requires the mcp:admin OAuth scope. Prompts for confirmation before creating (visible to every PackRat user). For personal templates use packrat_create_pack_template.

tools.name: packrat_create_catalog_item
tools.title: Create Catalog Item
tools.description: Submit a new gear item to the catalog. The API will embed and dedupe automatically. Use this for custom items not yet in the catalog.

tools.name: packrat_create_feed_comment
tools.title: Create Feed Comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a feed post (or reply to a parent comment).

tools.name: packrat_create_feed_post
tools.title: Create Feed Post
tools.description: Create a feed post with a caption and optional image keys.

tools.name: packrat_create_pack
tools.title: Create Pack
tools.description: Create a new packing list for the user. Returns the newly created pack with its ID.

tools.name: packrat_create_pack_template
tools.title: Create Pack Template
tools.description: Create a personal pack template visible only to you. To create a curated app template, use packrat_create_app_pack_template (admin-only).

tools.name: packrat_create_trip
tools.title: Create Trip
tools.description: Create a new trip plan with destination, dates, and optional link to a pack. Returns the created trip with its ID.

tools.name: packrat_delete_feed_comment
tools.title: Delete Feed Comment
tools.description: Delete one of your own feed comments.

tools.name: packrat_delete_feed_post
tools.title: Delete Feed Post
tools.description: Delete one of your own feed posts.

tools.name: packrat_delete_pack
tools.title: Delete Pack
tools.description: Soft-delete a pack. The pack will no longer appear in listings.

tools.name: packrat_delete_pack_template
tools.title: Delete Pack Template
tools.description: Delete a pack template.

tools.name: packrat_delete_pack_template_item
tools.title: Delete Pack Template Item
tools.description: Delete a pack template item.

tools.name: packrat_delete_trail_condition
tools.title: Delete Trail Condition Report
tools.description: Soft-delete one of your trail condition reports.

tools.name: packrat_delete_trip
tools.title: Delete Trip
tools.description: Delete a trip. The trip will no longer appear in listings.

tools.name: packrat_execute_sql_query
tools.title: Execute Read-Only SQL Query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT query against the PackRat database for advanced analytics. Only SELECT statements are allowed. Admin-only.

tools.name: packrat_extract_url_content
tools.title: Extract URL Content
tools.description: Extract the readable article content from any URL using Readability. Useful for ingesting blog posts, trip reports, or gear reviews.

tools.name: packrat_generate_pack_template_from_url
tools.title: Generate Pack Template From URL (Admin)
tools.description: Generate a pack template from a TikTok or YouTube link. Admin-only — requires the mcp:admin OAuth scope; the server also gates this on the authenticated user having role ADMIN. Prompts for confirmation before fetching and processing the URL content.

tools.name: packrat_get_catalog_item
tools.title: Get Catalog Item
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a specific gear catalog item by ID. Returns specs, dimensions, weight, price, availability, user reviews, Q&A, and product URL.

tools.name: packrat_get_database_schema
tools.title: Get Database Schema
tools.description: Get the PackRat DB schema — table names, columns, types. Admin-only.

tools.name: packrat_get_feed_post
tools.title: Get Feed Post
tools.description: Get a specific feed post by ID.

tools.name: packrat_get_guide
tools.title: Get Guide
tools.description: Get a specific guide by ID. Returns MDX/Markdown content.

tools.name: packrat_get_pack
tools.title: Get Pack
tools.description: Get complete details of a single pack including all items with weights, categories, and computed totals. Use this to analyze pack weight, find gear gaps, or suggest optimizations.

tools.name: packrat_get_pack_item
tools.title: Get Pack Item
tools.description: Get full details of a single pack item.

tools.name: packrat_get_pack_template
tools.title: Get Pack Template
tools.description: Get a pack template with its items.

tools.name: packrat_get_pack_weight_history
tools.title: Get Pack Weight History
tools.description: Get the weight history for all of the user's packs over time.

tools.name: packrat_get_profile
tools.title: Get My Profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's profile (firstName, lastName, email, avatar).

tools.name: packrat_get_season_suggestions
tools.title: Get Season Suggestions
tools.description: Generate season-appropriate pack suggestions for a location + date. Requires at least 20 inventory items on the signed-in user.

tools.name: packrat_get_trail
tools.title: Get Trail
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific trail by its OSM relation ID. Returns name, sport, difficulty, distance, and bounding box.

tools.name: packrat_get_trail_conditions
tools.title: Get Trail Condition Reports
tools.description: Get user-submitted trail condition reports. Filter by trail name to find reports for a specific trail or area.

tools.name: packrat_get_trail_geometry
tools.title: Get Trail Geometry
tools.description: Get full GeoJSON geometry for a trail. May be slow for large routes with many segments.

tools.name: packrat_get_trip
tools.title: Get Trip
tools.description: Get full details for a single trip including location coordinates, dates, notes, and linked pack information.

tools.name: packrat_get_weather
tools.title: Get Weather Forecast
tools.description: Get current weather conditions and multi-day forecast for any location. Returns temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity, and outdoor conditions relevant to trip planning.

tools.name: packrat_get_weather_forecast
tools.title: Get Weather Forecast By Location ID
tools.description: Fetch a 10-day forecast given a WeatherAPI location ID (returned by packrat_search_weather_location).

tools.name: packrat_identify_wildlife
tools.title: Identify Wildlife From Image
tools.description: Identify the plant or animal species in an uploaded image (provide the R2 image key from packrat_upload_image_url).

tools.name: packrat_list_feed
tools.title: List Feed Posts
tools.description: List social feed posts (paginated).

tools.name: packrat_list_feed_comments
tools.title: List Feed Comments
tools.description: List comments on a feed post.

tools.name: packrat_list_gear_categories
tools.title: List Gear Categories
tools.description: List all available gear categories in the catalog with item counts. Use this to explore what gear types are available before searching.

tools.name: packrat_list_guide_categories
tools.title: List Guide Categories
tools.description: List all guide categories.

tools.name: packrat_list_guides
tools.title: List Outdoor Guides
tools.description: List PackRat outdoor guides (paginated, filterable by category).

tools.name: packrat_list_my_trail_reports
tools.title: List My Trail Reports
tools.description: List trail condition reports authored by the signed-in user.

tools.name: packrat_list_pack_items
tools.title: List Pack Items
tools.description: List all items in a pack.

tools.name: packrat_list_pack_template_items
tools.title: List Pack Template Items
tools.description: List items inside a pack template.

tools.name: packrat_list_pack_templates
tools.title: List Pack Templates
tools.description: List both user-owned and app-curated pack templates.

tools.name: packrat_list_packs
tools.title: List My Packs
tools.description: List all packs belonging to the authenticated user. Returns pack summaries including name, category, item count, and total weight. Paginated: results are capped at 50 items per call; the response includes a `nextOffset` value (or `null` at the end) to continue iterating.

tools.name: packrat_list_trips
tools.title: List My Trips
tools.description: List all of the user's planned trips. Returns trip summaries including name, destination, dates, and linked pack. Paginated: results are capped at 50 per call; the response includes a `nextOffset` value (or `null` at the end) for continuation.

tools.name: packrat_preview_alltrails_url
tools.title: Preview AllTrails URL
tools.description: Fetch trail metadata (title, description, image) from an AllTrails URL using OpenGraph tags.

tools.name: packrat_record_pack_weight
tools.title: Record Pack Weight
tools.description: Record a weight measurement for a pack at a specific point in time.

tools.name: packrat_remove_pack_item
tools.title: Remove Pack Item
tools.description: Remove an item from a pack (soft-delete).

tools.name: packrat_search_gear_catalog
tools.title: Search Gear Catalog
tools.description: Search the PackRat gear catalog of outdoor products with specs, weights, prices, and user reviews. Use this to find specific gear, compare products, or browse categories. Paginated via `page` (1-indexed); page size is capped at 50 server-side.

tools.name: packrat_search_guides
tools.title: Search Outdoor Guides
tools.description: Full-text search across PackRat outdoor guides.

tools.name: packrat_search_outdoor_guides
tools.title: Search Outdoor Knowledge Base
tools.description: Search the PackRat outdoor knowledge base using retrieval-augmented search. Contains expert guides on outdoor skills, safety, Leave No Trace principles, gear techniques, navigation, first aid, and outdoor activities. Use this for "how-to" questions, technique guidance, or safety information.

tools.name: packrat_search_trails
tools.title: Search Trails
tools.description: Search outdoor trails and routes from OpenStreetMap. Filter by name, sport type, and/or proximity to a location. Returns { trails, hasMore } — paginate via offset.

tools.name: packrat_search_weather_by_coordinates
tools.title: Search Weather By Coordinates
tools.description: Find weather locations near a latitude/longitude pair.

tools.name: packrat_search_weather_location
tools.title: Search Weather Locations
tools.description: Search for weather locations by name. Returns matching locations with IDs.

tools.name: packrat_semantic_gear_search
tools.title: Semantic Gear Search
tools.description: Search the gear catalog using vector/semantic search. Good for natural-language queries like "warm but lightweight insulation layer for cold shoulder-season camping" or "minimalist trail running shoe for rocky terrain".

tools.name: packrat_similar_catalog_items
tools.title: Find Similar Catalog Items
tools.description: Find items similar to a given catalog item by embedding similarity.

tools.name: packrat_similar_pack_items
tools.title: Find Similar Pack Items
tools.description: Find catalog gear similar to a specific item in a pack (semantic similarity).

tools.name: packrat_submit_trail_condition
tools.title: Submit Trail Condition Report
tools.description: Submit a trail condition report to help the community. Requires user authentication.

tools.name: packrat_suggest_pack_items
tools.title: Suggest Pack Items
tools.description: Return catalog item suggestions for a pack based on the items already in it.

tools.name: packrat_toggle_feed_comment_like
tools.title: Toggle Feed Comment Like
tools.description: Like or unlike a feed comment (toggle).

tools.name: packrat_toggle_feed_post_like
tools.title: Toggle Feed Post Like
tools.description: Like or unlike a feed post (toggle).

tools.name: packrat_update_pack
tools.title: Update Pack
tools.description: Update a pack's name, description, category, visibility, or tags.

tools.name: packrat_update_pack_item
tools.title: Update Pack Item
tools.description: Update fields on an existing pack item.

tools.name: packrat_update_pack_template
tools.title: Update Pack Template
tools.description: Update a pack template.

tools.name: packrat_update_pack_template_item
tools.title: Update Pack Template Item
tools.description: Update a pack template item.

tools.name: packrat_update_profile
tools.title: Update My Profile
tools.description: Update the authenticated user's profile fields.

tools.name: packrat_update_trail_condition
tools.title: Update Trail Condition Report
tools.description: Update one of your own trail condition reports.

tools.name: packrat_update_trip
tools.title: Update Trip
tools.description: Update an existing trip's details, dates, location, or linked pack.

tools.name: packrat_upload_image_url
tools.title: Create Image Upload URL
tools.description: Generate a presigned R2 URL the caller can PUT an image to (jpeg/png/webp, ≤10MB). Returns { uploadUrl, key } — use `key` in downstream tools (packrat_analyze_pack_image, packrat_identify_wildlife, etc.).

tools.name: packrat_web_search
tools.title: Web Search
tools.description: Search the public web for current, real-time information. Use this for current trail conditions, recent news, current gear prices and deals, permit availability, or anything requiring up-to-date info not in the PackRat knowledge base.

tools.name: packrat_whoami
tools.title: Who Am I
tools.description: Return the currently authenticated PackRat user profile.
